metadata.title: Andares Santa Fe – Lots, Condos & Houses for Sale in Tijuana, Baja California
metadata.description: Andares Santa Fe offers 300 lots, 10 condos, and 45 houses in a secure, master-planned community in Tijuana. Build your dream home or move into a residence designed to last.

hero.tagline: Land, Homes, and Opportunities That Last.

lotExplorer.selectPrompt: Select a lot to see details

security.body: Our security gatehouse is designed to provide controlled access and enhance the safety of the entire community. By helping regulate entry and maintain a secure environment, it offers residents the confidence and peace of mind that come from knowing their families are protected in a thoughtfully planned neighborhood.

buildLiveGrow.body: Whether you're looking for the perfect lot to build your dream home or a move-in-ready residence, Andares offers a community designed for those who value quality, security, and lasting value. Every detail has been carefully planned so you and your family can thrive.
buildLiveGrow.imageAlt: Build, Live, and Grow at Andares
